environmentConstraints: Delegated Task/subagent launches failed with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`; flow validation was completed directly in-session after documenting the failure path in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

Passive runtime setup probes were unavailable during this round (`curl -sf http://localhost:8081/actuator/health` exit 7; TCP connect to 127.0.0.1:5433 refused), but the commercial-review assertion set was documentation-only and remained fully testable via `docs/code-review/**`.
